primitives.$description: Mode-independent raw values. Never referenced by components directly.

sans.$description: Primary sans — Inter with system fallbacks

display.$description: Display variant — optical size optimised for large text (falls back to Inter)

semantic.$description: Purpose-driven tokens with mode-keyed values for light/dark. Consumed by components.

space.$description: Mode-independent — spacing is the same in light and dark

typography.$description: Typographic roles. Each role is a composite style grouping family+size+weight+lineHeight+letterSpacing.

role.$description: Complete text styles — ready to apply as a full typographic spec

eyebrow.$description: Small uppercase label — section eyebrows, category tags

shadow.$description: Shadows need heavier opacity in dark mode to remain visible

elevation.$description: Elevation tiers — each combines surface color, shadow, and border for consistent depth.

subtle.$description: Slight lift — secondary cards, sidebar items

raised.$description: Standard card elevation — primary content surfaces

density.$description: Density modes — scale padding and control heights. Swap values to change global density.

default.$description: Standard density — balanced for desktop and mobile

compact.$description: Dense UI — data tables, admin dashboards

component.$description: Component tokens reference semantic tokens — dark mode propagates automatically.

card.$description: Card container — consumes elevation tokens, supports sm/md/lg sizes

modal.$description: Modal dialog — uses elevation.modal, sm/md/lg/xl sizes

checkbox.$description: Checkbox input — used in forms and selection lists

select.$description: Select dropdown — uses input tokens as base

tabs.$description: Tabbed navigation — indicator and active states

alert.$description: Inline message boxes for info, success, warning, danger

avatar.$description: User avatar — image, initials, or icon
